idea: Build ChangeGraph, a plant change-impact explorer showing fictional system dependencies, impacted nodes, required checks, approval blockers, and a local event history.
audience: Industrial change-control engineers reviewing a proposed plant change
outcome: Reviewers can understand downstream impact and cannot approve a change until every required check is complete.
constraints: Local-only with deterministic fictional data and no backend, auth, database, analytics, APIs, or network calls
The dependency view must have an accessible nonvisual representation
Record local event history deterministically and provide reset
Responsive and keyboard accessible with explicit blocker text
must_have_capabilities: Select a proposed change and show its downstream dependency impact
Highlight impacted nodes and provide the same information as accessible text
Block approval while named required checks remain incomplete
Complete checks, approve the change, and append local event history
visual_direction: A crisp engineering change-control surface with a simple dependency graph, synchronized detail, and audit-friendly history.
out_of_scope: Network graph libraries requiring external services
demo_preferences: Select a change, show affected dependencies, attempt approval and reveal blockers, complete checks, approve, show event history, then reset.
